message:
Resolve merge and improve redirect classification in command patterns

Resolve merge conflicts (all resolved cleanly — no content changes in
install.sh, fleet/executor.rs, fleet/mod.rs, hook.rs, transfer.rs).

Improve compound command classification (rch-common/src/patterns.rs):
- Replace naive '>' / '<' character checks with has_file_redirect()
  which properly distinguishes file redirects (> file, >> file, 2> file)
  from fd-to-fd redirects (2>&1, >&2, 1>&2)
- This fixes false negatives where legitimate compilation commands with
  stderr-to-stdout merging (e.g. "cargo build 2>&1") were being rejected
  as compound commands containing redirects
- The new function handles quoting (single/double), escaping, &> prefix,
  and N>&M fd-to-fd syntax

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
